keyboard.title: Keyboard Remapper
keyboard.subtitle: Remap the 3 special Xiaomi keys to custom actions

performance.title: Performance Mode
performance.subtitle: Choose how the laptop balances power and performance

descriptions.silence: Silent fan, ~7 W TDP. Best for light tasks on battery.
descriptions.balance: ~15 W sustained. Adaptive fan. Recommended for most use.
descriptions.turbo: ~25 W sustained, up to 45 W burst. Loud fan. Maximum power.
descriptions.smart: AI-adaptive 7–25 W. Learns workload patterns over time.
descriptions.longBattery: ~6 W TDP. Fan stopped. Extends battery 20–40% vs Balance.
descriptions.decepticon: ~35 W+ sustained. Requires firmware unlock. Extreme heat.
descriptions.smartAcceleration: AI-adaptive + burst to ~40 W on sudden load spikes.

techDetails.title: Technical Details
techDetails.overlayNote: Windows power mode changes automatically — this is expected behavior.
techDetails.aiLockedMsg: Configure an AI API key in Settings to unlock this mode.
techDetails.smartDiff: Both use AI to adapt TDP, but differ in reactivity. Smart adjusts gradually to sustained load (learns patterns over minutes); Smart Acceleration adds transient spike detection — reacts within seconds to sudden demands with a power burst before returning to the adaptive baseline. Use Smart for stable workloads; Smart Acceleration for mixed workflows with occasional intense loads.

modes.silence: Severely limits PL1/PL2. CPU boost is nearly disabled and GPU is capped at ~12 W. Sends WMI command 0 to HQWmiCommonInterface, instructing the EC to apply the most conservative firmware power limits. Best on battery for reading, video playback, or light office work.
modes.balance: Default mode. CPU can briefly boost to PL2 before settling at PL1. Fan responds gently to load. Covers most workloads without noticeable heat or noise. WMI command: 1.
modes.turbo: Unlocks high sustained TDP. CPU runs at full boost while thermals permit. GPU reaches max clock. Expect audible fan and warm surfaces. The EC sets maximum ACPI power limits. WMI command: 2.
modes.smart: Xiaomi AI engine analyzes CPU/GPU history over time and continuously adjusts PL1/PL2 between Silence and Turbo levels. Transitions are smooth and gradual — the system learns sustained patterns before increasing power. Does not react to sudden spikes. WMI command: 10. Requires AI API key to enable in MiControl.
modes.longBattery: Most aggressive power-saving mode. CPU is locked to base clock. GPU is minimized. Combined with Windows Power Saver, expect 20–40 % more battery vs Balance, with heavy tasks noticeably slower. WMI command: 11.
modes.decepticon: Beyond Turbo — requires ACPI firmware unlock. Removes all platform TDP caps. Maximum thermal budget is used. Extremely loud, hot, and may cause thermal throttling without active cooling. WMI command: 3.
modes.smartAcceleration: Smart + transient spike detection. Unlike Smart (which only adapts to sustained load), Smart Acceleration detects sudden spikes — opening apps, brief compiles, game load phases — and temporarily unlocks TDP near Turbo for 15–30 s before returning to the adaptive baseline. Best for mixed workloads. WMI command: 14. Requires AI API key.

display.title: Display
display.igclNotAvailable: Requires Intel IGCL — not found on this device
display.sensitivityHelpMin: Min/Max — limits the brightness range regardless of light level.
display.sensitivityHelpLevel: Sensitivity — max brightness reached at ~{lux} lux. Lower = outdoors (bright), higher = indoors (dim).
display.sensitivityHelpSmoothing: Smoothing — transition speed: 0 = instant, 90 = very gradual (~6 s per step).

fan.warning: Manual fan control may affect thermal performance

touchpad.hidNotAvailable: Hardware HID channel not found — haptics unavailable on this device
touchpad.gestureScreenshotDesc: Pinch 5 fingers to take a screenshot
touchpad.repressDesc: Enable force-click re-registration for improved pressure sensitivity
touchpad.edgeSlideDesc: Slide the left edge to adjust brightness; right edge to adjust volume

startup.title: Startup
startup.autoStartDesc: Launch MiControl automatically when Windows starts
startup.description: Automatically launch MiControl in the system tray when Windows starts

about.title: About MiControl
about.description: Standalone hardware manager for Xiaomi laptops. No dependency on XiaomiPCManager.
about.author: MiControl Contributors

errors.permissionDenied: Permission denied — try running as administrator
errors.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to hardware service

updates.title: Drivers & BIOS
updates.subtitle: Official update nucleus — powered by XiaomiPCManager scan engine
updates.xpmNotInstalled: Not installed — scan limited to local drivers
updates.nucleusNote: Invokes XiaomiPCManager's scan engine to find official driver and BIOS updates, preventing generic Windows Update drivers from overriding Xiaomi hardware-specific versions.

discovery.title: Device Setup
discovery.subtitle: Automatically discovers hardware paths and installs missing drivers
discovery.missingNote: These drivers are required for full hardware control. Click Install to add them from the bundled resources.
discovery.noBundledInf: No bundled .inf found in resources directory
discovery.adminHint: Tip: Right-click MiControl.exe → Run as administrator, then try again.
discovery.vhfNotRequired: Performance modes (Balance, Turbo, Decepticon…) work via the IoT service — the VHF driver is not required for them to function. Only the legacy VHF IOCTL path is unavailable.
discovery.noProfile: Hardware profile not yet loaded. Click Re-scan Hardware to start discovery.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure AI analysis and application preferences
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for the MiControl interface
settings.aiSubtitle: Connect an OpenAI-compatible API to enable intelligent hardware analysis
settings.apiKeyHint: Your OpenAI API key (starts with sk-). Never shared outside your device.
settings.baseUrlHint: Change to use a custom provider (Ollama, Azure OpenAI, LM Studio, etc.)
settings.modelHint: gpt-4o-mini is recommended — fast and cost-effective for hardware analysis
settings.storageNote: API key is stored locally in this browser's localStorage and never leaves your device.
settings.apiKeyMissing: API key not configured. Go to Settings to add your key.
